markets.no_sub_title: Max Christie
markets.rules_primary: If Max Christie records a Double Double in the Dallas at Boston professional basketball game originally scheduled for Mar 6, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Statistics are considered final at the conclusion of the specified time period of the basketball game. Statistics that count towards a double double include points, rebounds, assists, blocks, and steals. Any combination of 10+ in 2 or more of these statistics results in a double double. Corrections made after the game ends will not affect resolution. Statistics recorded during both regulation time and overtime count unless the time period specifies otherwise (e.g., "regulation only"). If the game is cancelled before starting, markets resolve to last fair price. If cancelled after starting and not resumed within 24 hours, markets resolve to last fair price except for thresholds already reached. If an entity (player or team) withdraws before the game, markets on that entity resolve to last fair price. If a player is injured, retires, or is disqualified during the game after playing at least one second, markets settle based on end-of-game statistics.
markets.title: Max Christie: Double Double
markets.yes_sub_title: Max Christie

markets.no_sub_title: 67° or above
markets.rules_primary: If the maximum temperature recorded at Oklahoma City for Mar 7, 2026, is greater than 66° fahrenheit according to the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Data for CLIOKC can be found by clicking the following URL: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/Climate?wfo=oun, navigating to the "Observed Weather" tab, and choosing the location "Oklahoma City Will Rogers Airport" with Daily Climate Report selected. Please use the latest version of the data for the desired date, keeping in mind that different cities update their reports at different frequencies.

Not all weather data is the same. While checking a source like AccuWeather or Google Weather may help guide your decision, the official and final value used to determine this market is the highest temperature as reported by the corresponding NWS Climatological Report (Daily) linked in the rules above. Preliminary NWS reporting and measurement methods may be subject to underlying rounding and conversion nuances. Traders should exercise caution when interpreting preliminary NWS data.
